name: BotaniX

brand_fit.recommendation: BotaniX trifft tonality und memorability solide – 'Botani' signalisiert klar den Pflanzenbezug, das 'X' verleiht Tech-Flair passend zur AI-Positionierung. Risiko: 'Botanix' existiert bereits als Markenname in mehreren Branchen (u.a. Pharma/Cannabis-Sektor), was den confusion_risk und potenziell die Markenanmeldung problematisch macht.

dominant_competitors: Plant Identifier: Botanix - App Store - Apple
Plant Identifier: Botanix - You Might Also Like - App Store
BotaniX - You Might Also Like - App Store - Apple

hard_blockers: trademark_conflict: DPMA or EUIPO match found
both_stores_taken: Name taken on Apple AND Google
soft_blockers: domain_partial: .com taken but other TLDs available
social_partial: Handle taken on Instagram, TikTok, X
aso_saturated: High keyword saturation in stores
recommendations: CRITICAL: Hard blockers detected. Name cannot proceed.
Consider alternative TLDs (.app, .io) or a modified name for .com
Check exact store listing names - slight variations may work
ASO: Highly saturated keyword space - differentiation needed
Social handles limited - consider adding a prefix (get/my/the)
